ground_truth.title: HR Outsourcing Services | Human Resource Consulting Group
ground_truth.main_content:
HR Outsourcing & Consulting Services

Comprehensive HR Services and Support for Your Business

The Human Resource Consulting Group provides comprehensive HR Services with a personal touch. Our team of experts can provide everything your business needs from complete HR outsourcing, to individual services like policy and procedure reviews.

We're here to become your full-time HR team, or supplement staff where needed. With our flexible services, state-of-the-art technology, and world-class client support, anything is possible.

We recognize that the needs of each business we work with are different, and we take pride in getting to understand our clients individually to create tailored and cost-effective solutions for payroll, risk management, HR administration, workforce management, and employee benefits management.

HRCG has become a premier provider of human resource services by partnering with business owners and entrepreneurs to manage their most important asset – people. Our primary differentiation is a high-touch service model coupled with technology and expertise. With HRCG, you get a team of certified HR professionals who provide proactive strategies that deliver positive outcomes for your business.

Interested in learning more about our full suite of services? Schedule a consultation to speak with one of our HR Service professionals about how we can address your HR and compliance needs so that you can gain the freedom to focus on growing your business.

Core HR Strategy
Align HR strategy to objectives, and develop policies and procedures with continuing support.

Recruitment/Staffing
Develop recruitment strategy and provide support on screening, applicant tracking, interviewing, enrollment and onboarding.

Mergers, Acquisition, and Divestiture Support
Ensure HR due diligence with HR integration support and develop communication & retention strategy.

Employee Leave Administration
Provide administrative processing, respond to employee inquiries and coordinate benefits with vendors.

HR Administration
Provide guidance on employee HR records, employee life cycle management, communication, and compliance measures.

Benefits Administration
Track employee benefit eligibility and change of status & manage employee termination and open enrollment.

Employee Relations
Address and document policy related questions and respond to employee queries; investigate employee complaints.

Performance Management
Develop and implement performance management systems and monitor workplace investigations.

Interested in learning more? Schedule a free consultation today.

Elevate Your Business with Comprehensive HR Outsourcing & Consulting Services

HR Outsourcing Helps Your Business Thrive
Download our Benefits of HR Outsourcing guide to see why thousands of small-to-mid-sized companies choose to outsource their HR functions to us and how it helps grow their businesses.

Why Us? See the HRCG Difference
Download our Services Overview to see how our comprehensive HR services can help your business thrive.
